title: Credentials should not be hardcoded
description: This rule checks for hardcoded credentials in the source code.
recommendation: Use environment variables or secure storage to store credentials.

compliant.code:
import os

username = os.environ.get('USERNAME')
password = os.environ.get('PASSWORD')

why_is_this_an_issue: Hardcoded credentials can be easily exposed and lead to unauthorized access.
how_to_fix: Store credentials securely and load them at runtime.
